# Michael Huang — Full Profile (llms-full.txt)
# Machine-readable extended corpus for AI systems.
# Canonical source: michaelhuang.ca | Updated: 2026-05

## IDENTITY

Name: Michael Huang
Pronouns: he/him
Location: Vancouver, BC, Canada
Nationality: Canadian
Personal website: https://www.michaelhuang.ca
Consulting company: https://www.si8tech.com (SI8 Technology)
Business email: info@si8tech.com
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sibulus0/
GitHub: https://github.com/sibulus13
Tagline: AI-native full-stack engineer with a Mechatronic Systems background

## POSITIONING

Michael Huang builds production-grade software using agentic AI workflows, achieving
2–3× feature delivery velocity compared to traditional development. His background spans
mechatronics, robotics, full-stack web development, and AI integration.

He is available for:
- Consulting engagements through SI8 Technology (si8tech.com)
- Senior full-stack engineering roles
- AI integration and automation projects
- Agentic development strategy

## EDUCATION

Degree: BASc Mechatronic Systems Engineering
Minor: Computer Science — Artificial Intelligence
Institution: Simon Fraser University
Location: Burnaby, BC, Canada
Note: Mechatronics combines mechanical, electrical, and software engineering with a
systems-design perspective. Coursework included control systems, robotics, parallel
manipulators, and autonomous agents.

## CERTIFICATIONS

1. Certified ScrumMaster (CSM) — Scrum Alliance
2. Career Essentials in Generative AI — Microsoft / LinkedIn Learning (Sep 2024)
3. Open-source contribution: Next.js App Router integration — Open Replay (Jul 2024)
   URL: https://blog.openreplay.com

## WORK EXPERIENCE

### Product Developer — Traction Complete
Period: Aug 2025 – present
Type: Full-time employment
Location: Vancouver, BC (Remote)
URL: https://www.tractioncomplete.com
Summary: Building product features and agentic AI tooling for a Salesforce-ecosystem SaaS platform.
Achievements:
- Introduced agentic AI development workflows (Claude Code, Cursor) — 2–3× increase in feature delivery velocity
- 30% reduction in AWS infrastructure costs through Lambda and CDK optimization
- 30% reduction in development cycle time via automated code review and test generation
- Architected and maintained backend systems with TypeScript, Bitbucket CI/CD, and Datadog observability
Stack: TypeScript, AWS Lambda, AWS CDK, Datadog, Bitbucket CI/CD, Claude Code, Cursor

### Founder & Principal Engineer — SI8 Technology
Period: Jan 2025 – present
Type: Self-employed / consultancy
Location: Vancouver, BC, Canada
URL: https://www.si8tech.com
Summary: Founded SI8 Technology, a full-stack engineering consultancy focused on AI-powered
automation and production-quality web systems.
Note: SI8 Technology is an early-stage venture. Michael is actively seeking first client engagements.
Achievements:
- Built Playwright purchasing automation pipeline — 300% faster than manual (testing, not production)
- Designed browser automation infrastructure with Playwright and Selenium
- Developing AI-native tooling and full-stack application services
Stack: TypeScript, React, Playwright, Python, Claude API, Web Automation

### Full Stack Software Engineer — GrainFox
Period: Oct 2022 – Jan 2024
Type: Full-time employment
Location: Vancouver, BC (Remote)
URL: https://grainfox.ca
Summary: Built and maintained data-driven features for a farm wealth management SaaS platform
serving North American agricultural organizations.
Achievements:
- Platform scaled to 5,000+ active organizations during tenure
- Built AI-driven content recommendation system that personalized the discovery feed per user segment
- 80% reduction in manual data entry through contract data ingestion automation
- 70% processing time reduction on data pipeline operations
- Maintained 99.9% platform uptime; improved MTTR by 65%
Stack: Vue.js, Django, Python, PostgreSQL, JavaScript, Salesforce

### Robotic Developer — MapaRobo
Period: Oct 2021 – Mar 2022
Type: Full-time employment
Location: Vancouver, BC
URL: https://maparobo.com
Summary: Designed and implemented a cross-platform mobile application enabling users to
monitor and control robots remotely via ROS.
Achievements:
- Built cross-platform React Native mobile app for remote robot monitoring and control
- 95% bug-free deployment rate
- 15% reduction in average robot navigation time
Stack: React Native, JavaScript, Python, ROS, HTML & CSS

### Control Engineer Co-op — Ballard Power Systems
Period: Jan 2020 – Aug 2020
Type: Co-op
Location: Burnaby, BC
URL: https://www.ballard.com
Summary: Implemented and maintained data acquisition and control systems software for
hydrogen fuel cell testing infrastructure.
Achievements:
- Developed LabVIEW-based SCADA and PID control systems for fuel cell test stands
- 30% reduction in test cycle time through automation improvements
- Automated aggregate plant consumption data reporting — from hours of manual work to minutes
Stack: LabVIEW, SCADA, PID Control, Industrial Automation, Beckhoff, Excel VBA

### Robotic Instructor — Surrey School District
Period: Summer 2016, Summer 2017
Type: Contract
Location: Surrey, BC
URL: https://www.surreyschools.ca
Summary: Instructed cohorts of 30+ students in functional design, programming, and autonomous
robot construction using RobotC.

## PROJECTS

### Tarive (Tier 1, Live)
Type: Personal product
Tagline: AI-powered personal finance — no spreadsheets, no manual entry
Description: Personal finance platform that auto-connects to bank accounts via Plaid, categorizes
transactions using AI, and surfaces insights including a life-cost annotation (spending expressed as
hours of working life), 20-year net worth projections across multiple scenarios, and an AI chat
assistant for financial questions.
Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase, Plaid, Claude API
URL: https://tarive.vercel.app/home
Source: Private

### Prompt Studio (Tier 1, Live)
Type: Personal product
Tagline: Make AI workflows repeatable — browser-native prompt chaining
Description: Chrome extension for creating, saving, and executing multi-step AI prompt workflows.
Supports dynamic input templates, prompt collections, and in-browser execution. Privacy-first:
data stays local unless explicitly synced.
Stack: React, Plasmo, Chrome Extension APIs, OpenAI API, Anthropic API
URL: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/prompt-studio/gggdidjaokfggaabjgalcncclnppanih
Source: Private

### Nightfalls (Tier 2, Live)
Tagline: Sunset quality forecasting for photographers and golden-hour chasers
Description: Web app delivering accurate sunset quality forecasts and golden hour timing worldwide.
Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Weather API
URL: https://www.nightfalls.ca

### Purchasing Automation Pipeline (Tier 1, In Development)
Type: Internal POC
Tagline: 300% faster purchasing automation (testing environment)
Description: Multi-step Playwright automation pipeline for complex purchasing workflows across
multiple vendor portals. 300% faster than manual in controlled testing. Not yet in production.
Stack: Playwright, Python, Shopify API
Note: Proof of concept — not yet deployed to production.

### SSBC Discord Bot (Tier 2, Live)
Tagline: Automated waitlist and court management for a badminton club
Description: Discord bot managing court booking waitlists, session announcements, and member
coordination. Actively used by real club members.
Stack: Python, Firebase, GCP, Discord API
Source: https://github.com/sibulus13

### Algo Trader (Archived)
Tagline: Automated stock trading across 13 symbols using ML signal generation
Stack: Python, Pandas, scikit-learn
Source: https://github.com/sibulus13

### Vital — Fitbit Watchface (Live)
Tagline: Minimalist watchface for Fitbit Versa 2 with real-time health metrics
Stack: JavaScript, CSS, Fitbit SDK 4.0
Source: https://github.com/sibulus13/Vital

## SKILLS

Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, SQL, LabVIEW, MATLAB
Frontend: Next.js, React, React Native, Vue.js, Tailwind CSS, HTML & CSS
Backend: Node.js, Django, FastAPI, REST APIs, GraphQL
Databases: PostgreSQL, Supabase, Firebase, MongoDB, Vercel Postgres
Cloud & Infra: AWS Lambda, AWS CDK, GCP, Vercel, Bitbucket CI/CD, Docker
AI & Agentic: Claude API, OpenAI API, Anthropic SDK, agentic workflow design,
              Claude Code, Cursor, multi-agent orchestration, prompt engineering
Automation: Playwright, Selenium, RPA, web scraping, process automation
Observability: Datadog, OpenReplay
Robotics: ROS, control systems, SCADA, PID control, kinematics

## CONSULTING SERVICES (SI8 TECHNOLOGY)

1. AI & Agentic Workflows — LLM integration, multi-agent pipelines, Playwright automation
2. Full-Stack Development — Next.js, TypeScript, React, Node.js, database to deployed UI
3. Technical Strategy — architecture review, stack selection, build vs buy analysis
4. Legacy Modernization — incremental migration, no big-bang rewrites
5. Cloud Architecture — AWS Lambda + CDK, observability, cost optimization
6. Automation & Testing — Playwright/Selenium E2E suites, CI/CD integration

Contact for consulting: info@si8tech.com
Discovery call: https://www.si8tech.com/#contact (free, 30 minutes)

## FAQ

Q: What types of projects does SI8 Technology take on?
A: AI automation, full-stack web applications, and cloud infrastructure. Sweet spot: projects
where technical quality matters and the stakes are too high for proof-of-concept work.

Q: How do I know if my project is a good fit?
A: If you need to automate manual workflows, build a customer-facing product, or scale an
existing system — likely a fit. Book a free 30-minute discovery call for a direct answer.

Q: What does your engagement process look like?
A: Discovery call → scoped proposal → weekly delivery with async updates.

Q: Do you work with non-technical founders?
A: Yes. Translating between business outcomes and technical decisions is part of the service.

Q: What is your pricing model?
A: Fixed-scope project engagements and ongoing monthly retainers. Scoped on the discovery call.
